creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
Created attachment 181552
Patch for updating to Piwik 3.0.3 (from 3.0.1)

Patch generated with FreeBSD Port Tools and submitted manually.

"port test" (and portlint) has been run.

Changelog (with security info): https://piwik.org/changelog/piwik-3-0-3/

NB! Please close issue 218034 which is replaced by this issue.
